name: UNITED STATES ANTIMONY CORP
business: United States Antimony Corporation's principal business is in the mining, procuring, processing and sale of antimony and precious metals, primarily gold and silver, in Montana and Mexico, and the mining, processing, and sale of zeolite in Idaho.

exposures.sentence: United States Antimony Corporation's principal business is in the mining, procuring, processing and sale of antimony and precious metals, primarily gold and silver, in Montana and Mexico, and the mining, processing, and sale of zeolite in Idaho.
In September 2025, the Company secured a five-year, sole-source Indefinite Delivery, Indefinite Quantity (IDIQ) contract with the U.S. Defense Logistics Agency (DLA) Strategic Materials
Antimony trisulfide is used as a primer in ammunition.
Antimony metal ingots are used in bearings, storage batteries, and ordnance.
Antimony trioxide is used to form a flame-retardant system for plastics, rubber, fiberglass, textile goods, paints, coatings, and paper
Zeolite has been successfully used to fertilize golf courses, sports fields, parks and common areas, and high value agricultural crops.
Animal Nutrition . According to third-party research, the inclusion of up to 2% zeolite in animal feed may increase growth rates, improve feed conversion, and reduce digestive disorders.
Zeolite is used for particulate, heavy metal and ammonium removal in swimming pools, municipal water systems, industrial water discharge streams, fisheries, fish farms, and aquariums.
Zeolite has shown a strong ability to selectively remove strontium, cesium, radium, uranium, and various other radioactive isotopes from solution.

Zeolite has been utilized in gas separation and purification processes, including re-oxygenation of downstream water from sewage plants, smelters, pulp and paper plants, and fishponds and tanks, and to remove carbon dioxide, sulfur dioxide and hydrogen sulfide from methane generators
In October 2025, the Company acquired approximately 10% of the total issued share capital of Larvotto Resources Limited

On February 10, 2026, the Company entered into a joint venture agreement with Americas Gold and Silver Corporation ( Americas ) to construct and operate a new, state-of-the-art hydrometallurgical processing facility.
Beginning in late 2024 and continuing into 2025 and 2026, the Company began acquiring mining claims and leases in Alaska, Montana, and Ontario, Canada.

catalysts.event: Secured five-year sole-source IDIQ contract with DLA for antimony metal ingots
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, the Company secured a five-year, sole-source Indefinite Delivery, Indefinite Quantity (IDIQ) contract with the U.S. Defense Logistics Agency (DLA) Strategic Materials

catalysts.event: Received initial sales orders under DLA contract totaling approximately $12 million
catalysts.sentence: The Company received sales orders under this contract in September 2025 and January 2026 totaling approximately $12 million.

catalysts.event: Executed five-year sales agreement with industrial customer for antimony trioxide
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, the Company executed a five-year sales agreement with an industrial customer for the sale of antimony trioxide.

catalysts.event: Entered into supply agreement with international supplier
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, the Company entered into a supply agreement with an international supplier using a hydrometallurgical facility for the purchase of antimony that meets specified quality standards over a period of approximately 36 months.

catalysts.event: Extended $2.5 million promissory note to international supplier
catalysts.sentence: The Company also extended a promissory note for approximately $2.5 million to the supplier.

catalysts.event: Acquired approximately 10% of Larvotto Resources Limited
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, the Company acquired approximately 10% of the total issued share capital of Larvotto Resources Limited

catalysts.event: Filed Technical Report Summary for zeolite mineral resources and reserves
catalysts.sentence: The Company established formal mineral resources and reserves associated with the zeolite mine under lease through a Technical Report Summary filed in July 2025

catalysts.event: Completed reincorporation from Montana to Texas
catalysts.sentence: Effective August 28, 2025, the Company completed its reincorporation from the State of Montana to the State of Texas
On July 1, 2025, the Company's common stock also began trading on a new stock exchange, the NYSE Texas.
On March 11, 2026, the Company's common stock began trading on the New York Stock Exchange.

catalysts.event: Entered into joint venture with Americas Gold and Silver Corporation
catalysts.sentence: On February 10, 2026, the Company entered into a joint venture agreement with Americas Gold and Silver Corporation ( Americas ) to construct and operate a new, state-of-the-art hydrometallurgical processing facility.

catalysts.event: Acquired flotation and concentration facility in Radersburg, Montana
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, the Company: i) completed the acquisition of a fully operational flotation and concentration facility in Radersburg, Montana

catalysts.event: Awarded $27.0 million under Title III of Defense Production Act
catalysts.sentence: announced that it had been awarded $27.0 million by the U.S. Department of War under Title III of the Defense Production Act to fund the expansion and modernization of the Company's domestic antimony production capabilities

catalysts.event: Purchased surface rights and mined 840 tons of antimony ore in Montana
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, the Company purchased the surface rights for some of its patented mining claims in Montana and mined 840 tons of antimony ore.

catalysts.event: Nearing completion of Montana processing facility expansion expected to more than triple capacity
catalysts.sentence: The Company also procured antimony ore from new international suppliers and is nearing construction completion of an expansion of its antimony processing facility located in Montana that is expected to more than triple its current capacity.
